reviews.review_msg: Poorly photo-copied handouts of a general opera guide, plus disorganized presentation of material does not rate high in my books. Sometimes retirement means just that: Retire, sir.
Dr Harvey taught me a lot in the Old English course back in 1984. He was an inspiring teacher.
Terrible professor. He has a condescending manner, and is notoriously difficult to track down.. even during office hours. Run away!
Dr. DeRoo is an excellent professor.  Excellent.  The best professor one could ever hope for.  Changed my life.
Dr. DeRoo is enthusiastic and his lectures are both interesting and entertaining.  He has a commanding voice (in both English and Old Norse), and an engaging personality.  Highly recommended.
Harvey teaches straight-up English. No bull. I find it annoying that so many English teachers use their classes as platforms for voicing their socio-political ideologies.

I don't know where your rating came from. Dr. Deroo was an AMAZING prof. He is so passionate and you can't help but love the way he says poetry. I hate english with a passion, and can honestly say that now I have a new found respect for poetry.
WHY ARE THIS GUY'S RATINGS SO HIGH?? Is he rating himself? Terrible professor. Hard marker, boring to listen to, stuck in his opinions.
I did 204 distance.  His study guide is amazing.  Anne Higgins read it to prep for her 304 class.  This guy knows medieval literature.

He is a Great Lecturer, but a rather absent minded and disorganized TA(who does mark hard), but you would be too if you had that many responsibilities. Take his classes for the simple pleasure of listening to him speak.
